mapper.select: SELECT id, product_id, available_quantity, reserved_quantity, total_quantity, version, create_time, update_time FROM stock ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock (product_id, available_quantity, reserved_quantity, total_quantity, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{availableQuantity}, #{reservedQuantity}, #{totalQuantity}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE stock SET available_quantity = available_quantity - #{changeQuantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE stock SET reserved_quantity = reserved_quantity + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE stock SET reserved_quantity = reserved_quantity - #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId}

UPDATE stock SET reserved_quantity = reserved_quantity - #{quantity}, available_quantity = available_quantity + #{quantity}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND reserved_quantity >= #{quantity}
